title: Tesla is not alone: 18 (and a half) other big stocks are headed for their worst year on record
text: In the worst year for stocks since the Great Recession, several big names are headed for their worst year on record with just one trading day left in 2022.

title: Estee Lauder: The Weakest Link
text: Estée Lauder ranks amongst the industry leaders in terms of valuation, edging L'Oréal on P/E and EV/EBITDA ratios. The company's revenue contracted 16% YoY and the outlook is grim, with EPS targets down 57% YoY and a 10% revenue decline for the last twelve months.

title: Jefferies Makes Massive 2023 Changes to ‘Strong Buy' Franchise List of Top Stock Picks
text: All the companies that we follow here at 24/7 Wall St. keep a curated list for their institutional and high net worth retail clients of their highest conviction stock picks.

title: 5 Consumer Defensive Stocks Gurus Are Loading Up On
text: U.S. market indexes traded lower on Thursday morning after the Federal Reserve raised interest rates by half a point on Wednesday and retail sales in November fell more than expected.

title: Jim Cramer says he likes these 5 consumer staple stocks in 2023
text: With the central bank looking unlikely to pivot anytime soon, fears are mounting on Wall Street that a recession could be in the cards for next year.

title: 7 Stocks on the Cusp of a Breakout
text: It's time to look for strong, potential breakout stocks. All as the outlook for the U.S. economy and the overall stock market start to improve.

title: Analyst: Estee Lauder Stock a "Buy" Ahead of 2023
text: This morning, Deutsche Bank upgraded Estee Lauder Companies Inc (NYSE:EL) to "buy" from "hold," and hiked its price target by $57 to $266.

title: This Retail Stock Could Steal the Show in December
text: Subscribers to  Chart of the Week  received this commentary on Sunday, November 27.
